In [ ]:
df = [pd.read_csv("{}s.csv".format(decade)) for decade in ['60', '70', '80', '90', '2000', '2010']]
In [ ]:
for i, decade in enumerate([1960, 1970, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2010]):
    df[i]['decade'] = pd.Series(decade, index=df[i].index)

df = pd.concat(df, axis=0).sample(frac=1.0, random_state=1).reset_index(drop=True)

percent = (df.isnull().sum()/df.isnull().count()).sort_values(ascending=False)
missing = pd.concat([total,percent],axis=1,keys=["total","percent"])

import seaborn as sns
from matplotlib import pyplot as plt
In [ ]:
figure = plt.figure()
figure.suptitle("Distribution of danceability ")
sns.kdeplot(x = df["danceability"], hue=df["decade"], palette = sns.color_palette())
plt.show()

In [ ]:
positive_tracks = df.loc[df["valence"] >= 0.50]
negative_tracks = df.loc[df["valence"] < 0.50]

print("Total Number of positive songs:", positive_tracks["target"].count())
print("Total Number of negative songs:", negative_tracks["target"].count())

Total Number of positive songs: 23435
Total Number of negative songs: 17671
In [ ]:
negative_tracks_by_decade = pd.DataFrame(negative_tracks.groupby("decade")["target"].count())
negative_tracks_by_decade.columns.values[0] = "count"
positive_tracks_by_decade = pd.DataFrame(positive_tracks.groupby("decade")["target"].count())
positive_tracks_by_decade.columns.values[0] = "count"

figure, axis = plt.subplots(ncols=2)
figure.suptitle('Number of positive and negative tracks by decade', fontsize=16)
axis[0].set_title('negative songs')
axis[1].set_title('positive songs')
figure.set_size_inches(12, 6)
sns.barplot(x=negative_tracks_by_decade.index, y=negative_tracks_by_decade["count"], ax=axis[0])
sns.barplot(x=positive_tracks_by_decade.index, y=positive_tracks_by_decade["count"], ax=axis[1])

<Axes: title={'center': 'positive songs'}, xlabel='decade', ylabel='count'>

1 So Fly NB Ridaz Featuring Gemini spotify:track:2BjIi07kN0yKSur0Fwrnss 0.861 0.519 2 -6.404 1 0.1120 0.136 0.0000 0.1230 0.519 81.966 254533 4 50.03590 11 1 2000
In [ ]:
def normalize_column(col):
    max_d = df[col].max()
    min_d = df[col].min()
    df[col] = (df[col] - min_d)/(max_d - min_d)
In [ ]:
num_types = [ 'int64', 'float64']
num = df.select_dtypes(include=num_types)
        
for col in num.columns:
    normalize_column(col)

from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler
scaler = MinMaxScaler()
In [ ]:
scaled = pd.DataFrame(scaler.fit_transform(X))
scaled.columns = cols

In [ ]:
scaled= scaler.fit_transform(X)
In [ ]:
wcss = []
for i in range(1,12):
  kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters = i, init = 'k-means++', max_iter = 300, n_init = 10, random_state = 0)
  kmeans.fit(scaled)
  wcss.append(kmeans.inertia_)
plt.plot(range(1,12), wcss, 'o')
plt.plot(range(1 , 12) , wcss , '-' , alpha = 0.5)
plt.title('Elbow Method')
plt.xlabel('Number of Clusters')
plt.show()
In [ ]:
kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters = 8, init = 'k-means++', max_iter = 300, n_init = 10, random_state = 0)
y_kmeans = kmeans.fit_predict(scaled)
In [ ]:
from mpl_toolkits.mplot3d import Axes3D

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13,11))
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 0,0],scaled[y_kmeans == 0,1], s= 50, c= 'red',label= 'Cluster 1')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 1,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 1,1], s= 50, c= 'blue', label= 'Cluster 2')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 2,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 2,1], s= 50, c= 'green', label= 'Cluster 3')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 3,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 3,1], s= 50, c= 'cyan', label= 'Cluster 4')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 4,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 4,1], s= 50, c= 'magenta', label= 'Cluster 5')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 5,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 5,1], s= 50, c= 'yellow', label= 'Cluster 6')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 6,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 6,1], s= 50, c= 'orange', label= 'Cluster 7')
plt.scatter(scaled[y_kmeans == 7,0], scaled[y_kmeans == 7,1], s= 50, c= 'black', label= 'Cluster 8')





plt.title('Clusters')
plt.legend()

plt.show()
In [ ]:
df_cluster['label'] = y_kmeans

fig = sns.barplot(x=df_cluster['label'].value_counts().index, 
                  y=df_cluster['label'].value_counts()
                 )

plt.title('# of Songs in each Group')
plt.ylabel('')
fig = fig.get_figure()
fig.set_size_inches(10, 4)
fig.show()
